creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
The ntopng port in the latest branch is updated to 4.2, up to commits made in 2020-11-02.

I understand you are using the quarterly ports branch. Please move to the latest branch if you need newer versions.

Documentation on how to switch binary package repository is in the EXAMPLES section of the pkg.conf(5) man page.

The ports system rules don't allow feature updates to be merged to the quarterly branch. Only security  updates, build, runtime fixes for bugs and sometimes technical changes to the ports structure themselves are allowed.

I'd be inclined to close this bug report as "closed - not a bug" but I'd rather wait for some feedback.
